reviews.comment:
Puedo opinar sobre la confitería. A pesar de la estructura tipo autoservicio siempre atienden muy bien. La mercadería no es cara . Las chicas siempre con una sonrisa (las admiro por su buen animo) el café muy bueno . No hay demasiadas confitería a la mañana en Don Torcuato y es una buena opción

(Translated by Google)
I can give my opinion about the pastry shop. Despite the self-service setup, the service is always excellent. The products aren't expensive. The staff always have a smile (I admire their positive attitude), and the coffee is very good. There aren't many pastry shops in Don Torcuato in the morning, so this is a good option.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJcjdYNmpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente el personal de YPF boxes hace más de 10 años que hago el cambio de aceites y filtros. Súper recomendable

(Translated by Google)
The staff at YPF Boxes are excellent. I've been getting my oil and filter changed there for over 10 years. Highly recommended.
